roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC1001,9 MOTION X2 SEAL ARREST RECORD FILED

/CAL PTD PROG RPT/DAWT/X COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE FOR ELIGIBILITY FOR PRETRAL DIVERSION, AND FURTHER FINDS DIVERSION HAS BEEN SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETED,THEREFORE THE CHARGES ARE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO 1001,7 AND 1001,9 PC,/
